data.title: India's Railway Finance Corporation Considers Swiss Franc Loans Amid Rupee Decline
data.description: India's Railway Finance Corporation is contemplating the conversion of some of its USD-denominated loans into Swiss franc loans to mitigate foreign exchange risks due to the rupee's depreciation. According to NS3.AI, this strategy is in line with broader BRICS discussions on reducing reliance on the U.S. dollar, potentially prompting other Indian state-run enterprises to adopt similar measures. The initiative aims to decrease funding costs and minimize foreign exchange losses, as the rupee has weakened by 6% against the dollar over the past year.

data.title: Euro Emerges as Key Currency Against Dollar Amid Fed Policy Pressure
data.description: The euro has become a significant currency for trading against the dollar, according to ChainCatcher. Barclays reports that the dollar is nearing a four-year low due to the strengthening of the yen and expectations surrounding U.S. Federal Reserve policies.

data.title: Uniswap to Introduce Auction Feature in Web App
data.description:
Uniswap is set to launch an 'Auction' tab on the 'Explore' page of its web application on February 2. According to PANews, this new feature will support the Continuous Clearing Auctions (CCA) protocol, allowing users to discover, bid, and claim tokens directly through the interface.

For new assets, this development enables users to participate in auctions before the tokens are officially available for trading. For existing assets, teams can utilize the same mechanism to allocate supply and initiate liquidity. The CCA protocol, which operates without permission, aims to assist teams in distributing tokens, establishing reliable market prices, and starting liquidity.

data.title: Top Bitcoin mining stocks rise amid US winter storm hashrate decline
data.description:
Hashrate fell sharply as Bitcoin miners curtailed operations during extreme cold, boosting profitability for companies that stayed online.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/top-bitcoin-mining-stocks-soar-us-winter-hashrate-decline?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin’s Four-Year Cycle Is “Dead,” Claims the World’s Smartest Man
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC)’s long-debated four-year cycle may be losing relevance, according to YoungHoon Kim, widely described as the “smartest man in the world” after being recognized with an IQ of 276. Indeed, per his views, the original cryptocurrency asset could be entering a decade-long supercycle rather than another traditional boom-and-bust phase. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/bitcoins-four-year-cycle-is-dead-claims-the-worlds-smartest-man/

data.title: Pudgy Penguins Sees Price Surge Amid Decline in Social Sentiment
data.description: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) has experienced an 18% increase in value over the past four days, despite a notable 95% decline in positive social sentiment. According to NS3.AI, whale holdings have risen by 23.6%, indicating strong confidence among major investors, even as broader smart money involvement remains largely unchanged. Technical indicators, including a falling wedge pattern and bullish RSI divergence, suggest a potential trend reversal. However, the presence of high leverage and weak sentiment poses a risk of failure.

data.title: Flare targets XRP liquidity expansion with FXRP/USDH spot market launch on Hyperliquid
data.description:
Flare has launched the FXRP/USDH spot market on Hyperliquid in a bid to deepen XRP liquidity and utility within Hyperliquid’s onchain orderbook and the broader HyperEVM ecosystem  The new market builds on the foundation set out by the rollout of FXRP/USDC two weeks ago and marks another step in Flare’s effort to deepen XRP liquidity […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/flare-targets-xrp-liquidity-expansion-with-fxrp-usdh-spot-market-launch-on-hyperliquid/

data.title: Crypto Crime Hit All-Time High in 2025, With Russian Stablecoin Playing Key Role: TRM Labs
data.description:
Some $158 billion worth of illicit crypto traded last year, and much of that activity came from just one source: a ruble-pegged stablecoin with ties to Russia.
source: https://decrypt.co/356101/crypto-crime-all-time-high-2025-russian-stablecoin-trm-labs

data.title: Coinbase: Moonbirds (BIRB) spot trading will launch on January 28th.
data.description: Coinbase Markets announced on its X platform that spot trading of the Moonbirds (BIRB)-USD trading pair will be available in supported regions on January 28, 2026, provided liquidity conditions are met.

data.title: The USDC Treasury burned 95.15 million USDC tokens on Ethereum.
data.description: According to Whale Alert, the USDC Treasury destroyed 95,150,000 USDC (worth $95,191,295) on the Ethereum network.

data.title: Security Concerns Arise from Oracle Data Sources in Blockchain Transactions
data.description: Oracle data sources, including Web2 news sites and Twitter, are under scrutiny for their low security standards. According to NS3.AI, these platforms do not adequately recognize the impact a single message can have on the ownership of substantial on-chain assets valued at millions. This vulnerability underscores significant security risks associated with relying on such data for blockchain transactions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency's Role in Preventing AI Centralization
data.description: Cryptocurrency is seen as a vital safeguard against the potential dominance of centralized artificial intelligence, which could have perilous implications for the technology sector. According to NS3.AI, the decentralization offered by cryptocurrencies is essential for maintaining technological diversity and freedom. The main threat is concentrated at the application layer, where the risks of centralization are most significant.

data.title: Fidelity Investments Introduces Ethereum-Based Stablecoin FIDD
data.description: Fidelity Investments has unveiled its new stablecoin, FIDD, which is constructed on the Ethereum blockchain and issued by Fidelity Digital Assets. According to NS3.AI, the stablecoin is backed 1:1 by a reserve consisting of cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasuries, adhering to the GENIUS Act standards. FIDD facilitates continuous 24/7 institutional settlement and on-chain retail payments. It offers daily transparency through issuance and reserve disclosures, along with regular third-party audits to ensure compliance and reliability.

data.title: Trump to Announce Federal Reserve Chair Nominee Soon
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump revealed during a speech in Iowa that he will soon announce his choice for the Federal Reserve Chair. According to ChainCatcher, market analyst Ghiles Guezout suggested that the announcement could come as early as today. Trump has already decided on Jerome Powell's successor, and financial analyst Eamonn Sheridan from Investinglive believes the announcement might occur during the Federal Reserve's January policy meeting to potentially influence policy direction. The Federal Reserve's FOMC is set to release its interest rate decision at 03:00 UTC+8 on Thursday.

source: https://x.com/BSCNews/status/2016506055929250239

data.title: Crypto Market Developments and Predictions for 2026
data.description:
BloFin Research's outlook for 2026 examines significant trends across major cryptocurrency sectors. According to NS3.AI, the report discusses Bitcoin's evolving cycle dynamics and Ethereum's platform strength compared to its asset narrative. It also explores the competitive environment of Layer 1 blockchains. The analysis highlights structural growth and limitations in perpetual decentralized exchanges (Perp DEXs), the revival of privacy coins such as Zcash over Monero, and the maturation of prediction markets as key financial infrastructure.

The report anticipates increased institutional influence in the crypto space, along with hybrid trading models that integrate centralized exchanges (CEXs) and decentralized exchanges (DEXs). Technological advancements are expected to play a crucial role in shaping the future of cryptocurrency markets.

data.title: XRP Could Enter New Growth Phase After Clarity Act Decision — Here’s How
data.description:
XRP may be approaching a pivotal turning point as regulatory uncertainty is moving closer to resolution with the upcoming Clarity Act decision. If the Clarity Act establishes a clearer framework, XRP could unlock fresh capital flows, renewed exchange participation, and broader integration across the financial platforms. This moment could represent the transition from consolidation to a new phase of sustained growth. How Clear Rules Could Reshape XRP Market Perception The passing of the Clarity Art will trigger XRP to go absolutely parabolic
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/xrp-eye-new-growth-phase/

data.title: He Yi: Cathie Wood is not a Binance user. Binance does not serve Americans or US entities.
